div.p: In a. June 1950 memorandum the Department of State described “Soviet Violations of Treaties and Agreements.” This study brought up to date the document which had been submitted on June 2, 1948, to the Senate Committee on Foreign Relations in response to Senate Resolution 213, 80th Congress, 2d session. (See the editorial note in Foreign Relations, 1948, volume IV, page 881.) This supplementary memorandum is printed in American Foreign Policy, 1950–1955 (Washington, Government Printing Office, 1957), volume II, pages 1937–1944, and in the Department of State Bulletin, July 3, 1950, pages 8–12.
